query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A wooded area with leafless trees enveloped in heavy fog. Numerous bare trunks and branches are visible as subtle gray shapes at varying depths, partially obscured by the dense mist. The ground appears as a dark, indistinct plane beneath the trees. The entire scene is rendered in shades of gray with no visible sky, horizon, or color variation, creating a continuous atmospheric veil across the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A wooded area with leafless trees enveloped in heavy fog, presented with muted, faded gray tones and extremely low contrast. Numerous bare trunks and branches appear as subtle, washed-out shapes at varying depths, partially obscured by the dense mist under flat, directionless lighting that eliminates shadows and highlights. The ground appears as a dark, indistinct plane beneath the trees. The uniformly gray palette and crushed midtones create an oppressive atmosphere evoking dread and melancholy, with no visible sky or horizon, producing a continuous atmospheric veil across the frame that conveys atmospheric distress.
